rawAssistant: Preparing for the spire is a test of endurance and strategy. As you've balanced your team with Thornbeast and Gremlin, now think about terrain. The misty road ahead offers little cover; keep that in mind when positioning for upcoming challenges. Rest well tonight – the journey will be long and unforgiving.
